Backup & Recovery ?
Auto-backups are saved every 5 minutes to your browser. Download a .json backup for extra safety.
Import from MO2 Folder ?
Pick your MO2 mods/ folder — finds all ARCH-generated scripts and reconstructs their groups automatically.

Pick your MO2 mods/ folder to scan for modded item definitions. Found items will appear in spawn loadout autocomplete. No modded items loaded
